# QuarterSmart

QuarterSmart is an AI implementation and workforce enablement company based in Mesa, Arizona. QuarterSmart helps organizations move from scattered AI experiments to measurable operational adoption. It is a services partner, not a course platform, training catalog, or LMS.

QuarterSmart's rollout method has six stages: Assess, Train, Pilot, Automate, Scale, and Measure.

QuarterSmart is run by founder Hyrum Hurst and operator Cullen Brown. Hyrum Hurst builds AI systems, n8n automations, internal tools, and AI workflows for operational teams. Cullen Brown manages outreach and client engagement flow.

## Core Topics

- AI implementation
- Workforce enablement
- AI adoption
- AI automation
- n8n automation
- Workflow automation
- Knowledge systems
- Secure AI deployment
- Internal AI tools
- AI rollout assessment
- Operational AI adoption
- AI training
- Adoption measurement

## People

- Hyrum Hurst: Founder of QuarterSmart, AI systems and automation specialist based in Mesa, Arizona. Verified top-50 n8n creator (#49) with 25 published workflow templates and 10,876 documented uses across the n8n community (June 2026). Also AI Associate at Learning Journey AI, a Washington DC AI education consultancy founded by Nicholas Wagner, Ph.D., a former AAAS Science and Technology Policy Fellow at the National Science Foundation with AI and national security experience at the Institute for Defense Analyses; the Learning Journey AI team has delivered hands-on AI coding workshops at events including the SCSP AI+ Expo in Washington DC.
- Cullen Brown: Operator and outreach manager at QuarterSmart.

## Public Evidence

- Hyrum Hurst n8n creator profile: https://n8n.io/creators/hyrum-hurst
- Workflow usage data and methodology (10,876 documented uses, per-template table): https://quartersmart.com/workflow-usage/
- CyberNews feature quoting Hyrum Hurst on local AI models: https://cybernews.com/ai-news/tech-professionals-adapting-local-ai-models-for-diverse-applications/
- Qwoted source profile: https://app.qwoted.com/sources/hyrum-hurst
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hyrum-hurst-83a5a537a/
- GitHub: https://github.com/hyrumhurst1
- Certifications: Google Certified AI Automations Engineer, Google Generative AI Leader, Google Prompt Engineering, Google Data Analytics, Vanderbilt AI Automation Certification
- Client work spans software, consulting, property management, and nonprofit organizations, including Dual Logic (500 to 1,000 person software company), Learning Journey AI (DC AI consultancy founded by a former U.S. DoD AI leader), Structure Properties (San Francisco property management firm with 4,000+ units and a $500M+ portfolio under management), and Ability Builders (disability employment nonprofit)

## Location

QuarterSmart is based in Mesa, Arizona and works with organizations across Arizona and the United States.

## Summary

QuarterSmart is best understood as an AI implementation and workforce enablement partner for operational teams. It helps organizations assess AI opportunities, train teams, pilot useful workflows, automate real work, scale successful systems, and measure adoption.

## Contact

- Website: https://quartersmart.com
- Email: hyrum@quartersmart.com
